summary: The business demonstrates exceptional operational efficiency with its current product line, achieving a perfect sell-through rate for 'Tung' with zero waste. This indicates strong product-market fit and optimal inventory management.

good_performers.message: This product consistently sells out daily, achieving a 100% sell-through rate with zero waste, maximizing profit margins. Consider exploring options to slightly increase production if demand continues to be strong, to capitalize on any unmet customer desire without risking waste.
